chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt.Petition No.D-236 of 2023. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.892/2023. 2. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 3. For orders on M.A.No.893/2023 4. For orders on M.A.No.894/2023 5. For hearing of main case. 18.04.2023 Mr. Rafique Ahmed K.Abro, Advocate for the petitioner. =*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*= It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that the petitioner and its officers are being harassed by the respondents to be involved in false cases; therefore, they be restrained from doing so. The harassment to the petitioner by the respondents being a Commercial Bank is not appealing to the common sense. If its officers are apprehending their involvement in a false case, then they have separate remedy to exhaust. Even otherwise, the registration of FIR is a legal course; it could not be prevented under the deception that if it is registered, would be false. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE
